title: HRS Terli project
text:
Show code
terlipressin <- read_xlsx("/Users/to909/Desktop/Terlipressin/final_master_0508.xlsx")

terlipressin_numeric <- terlipressin  # make a copy



for (col in names(terlipressin_numeric)) {
  # Suppress warnings like "NAs introduced by coercion"
  converted <- suppressWarnings(as.numeric(terlipressin_numeric[[col]]))
  
  # If at least one value successfully converted (not NA), keep it
  if (any(!is.na(converted))) {
    terlipressin_numeric[[col]] <- converted
  }
}

terlipressin_numeric <- terlipressin_numeric %>% 
  mutate(
    group = "terli",
    death_discharge = ifelse(disposition == 5, 1, 0)
  ) %>% 
  rename(
    terli_resfailuretype_day2 = terli_resfailuretype_day1_day2
  ) %>% 
  select(-any_of(c("fena"))) %>% 
  rename(
    age_admission = age, 
    sex = sex_male,
    White = race, 
    hispanic_race = hispanic,
    loop_diuretic = diuretics_preadmission,
    aldosterone_antagonist = potsp_diuretic_preadmission,
    lactulose = lactulose_preadmission,
    rifaximin = rifaximin_preadmission,
    prophylactic_antibiotic = sbp_ppx_preadmission,
    nsaids = nsaid_preadmission,
    beta_blockers = nsbb_preadmission,
    albumin_amount_admission = totalalbumin_before_terli, # changed 1129
    diabetes = dm_medical_hx,
    cad = cad_medical_hx,
    htn = htn_medical_hx,
    etiology_cirrhosis = cirrhosis_etiology,
    ascites_admission = ascites_previous_comp,
    encephalopathy_admission = he_previous_comp,
    gi_bleed_admission = gibleed_hosp,
    peritonitis_admission = sbp_previous_comp,
    hcc_admission = hcc_previous_comp,
    tips_admission = tips_previous_comp,
    na_admit = na_terli_day0,
    k_admit = k_terli_day0,
    cl_admit = chloride_terli_day0,
    co2_admit = bicarb_terli_day0,
    bun_admit = bun_terli_day0,
    urine_creatinine = ua_cr_value_hrs,
    fena = fena_hrs,
    he_grade_admission = hegrade_admit,
    baseline_creatinine = baseline_scr,
    CLIF_C_Score = clif_c_score,
    aclf_grade = aclf_grade,
    liver_transplant_listed = listed_transplant,
    icu_admission = icu_admit,
    liver_transplant = transplant_lt_status,
    peak_creatinine = peakhospit_scr,
    AKI_responders = hrs_responders,
    death_in_90days_status = time_to_death_status, # checked 1129
    los = days_to_discharge,
    intubated = mv_use, # checked 1129
    discharge_disposition = disposition,
    creatinine_admission = scr_admit,
    time_90days = time_to_death_90days_cmp,
    status_90days = time_to_death_status_90days_cmp,
    MELD_baseline = admit_meld, # checked 1129
    MELD_Na_baseline = admit_meld_na, # checked 1129
    palliative_care = pall_consult # checked 1129
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    # sex_male==1 -> sex==2 (male)
    sex = if_else(sex == 1, 1, 2), # updated 1129
    
    # race / ethnicity
    White = if_else(White == 1, 1, 0),
    hispanic_race = if_else(hispanic_race == 1, 1, 0),
    
    # medication use
    Loop_diuretic = if_else(loop_diuretic == 1, 1, 0),
    aldosterone_antagonist = if_else(aldosterone_antagonist == 1, 1, 0),
    lactulose = if_else(lactulose == 1, 1, 0),
    rifaximin = if_else(rifaximin == 1, 1, 0),
    prophylactic_antibiotic = if_else(prophylactic_antibiotic == 0, 0, 1),
    nsaids = if_else(nsaids == 1, 1, 0),
    beta_blockers = if_else(beta_blockers == 1, 1, 0),
    # rrt 
    rrt = ifelse(rrt == 2, 0, rrt),
    
    # comorbidities
    diabetes = if_else(diabetes == 1, 1, 0),
    cad = if_else(cad == 1, 1, 0),
    htn = if_else(htn == 1, 1, 0),
    
    # cirrhosis etiology mapping (reverse of your previous)
    etiology_cirrhosis = case_when(
      etiology_cirrhosis == 1 ~ 1,
      etiology_cirrhosis == 3 ~ 2,
      etiology_cirrhosis == 2 ~ 3,
      etiology_cirrhosis %in% c(4, 5) ~ 4,
      etiology_cirrhosis == 6 ~ 5,
      TRUE ~ NA_real_
    ),  # changed 1129
    
    # complications
    ascites_admission = if_else(ascites_admission == 1, 1, 0),
    encephalopathy_admission = if_else(encephalopathy_admission == 1, 1, 0),
    gi_bleed_admission = if_else(gi_bleed_admission == 1, 1, 0),
    peritonitis_admission = if_else(peritonitis_admission == 1, 1, 0),
    hcc_admission = if_else(hcc_admission == 1, 1, 0),
    tips_admission = if_else(tips_admission == 1, 1, 0),
    
    # hepatic encephalopathy grade: new(0–4) → old(1–5)
    he_grade_admission = case_when(
      he_grade_admission == 0 ~ 1,
      he_grade_admission == 1 ~ 2,
      he_grade_admission == 2 ~ 3,
      he_grade_admission == 3 ~ 4,
      he_grade_admission == 4 ~ 5,
      TRUE ~ NA_real_
    ),
    liver_transplant = ifelse(liver_transplant == 1 | liver_transplant == 2, 1, 0),
    
    discharge_disposition = case_when(
      discharge_disposition == 5 ~ 1,
      discharge_disposition == 1 ~ 2,
      discharge_disposition == 2 ~ 3,
      discharge_disposition == 3 ~ 3,
      discharge_disposition == 4 ~ 4,
      TRUE ~ NA_real_
    ),
    AKI_responders = case_when(
      AKI_responders == 2 ~ "complete response",
      AKI_responders == 1 ~ "partial response",
      AKI_responders == 0 ~ "no response"
    )
  )

create_first_nonzero_value <- function(data, original_variable, new_variable) {
  # Build the expected column names
  day_vars <- paste0(original_variable, "_day", 1:13)
  
  # Keep only those that exist in the dataset
  valid_day_vars <- day_vars[day_vars %in% names(data)]
  
  # Apply logic and keep only subjectid + new_variable
  data %>%
    rowwise() %>%
    mutate(
      !!sym(new_variable) := {
        values <- c_across(all_of(valid_day_vars))
        first_valid <- values[!is.na(values) & values != 0]
        if (length(first_valid) > 0) first_valid[1] else NA
      }
    ) %>%
    ungroup() %>%
    select(subjectid, all_of(new_variable))  # keep subjectid + new var
}

var1 <- c(
  "group",
  "age_admission", "sex", "White", "hispanic_race", "loop_diuretic",
  "aldosterone_antagonist", "lactulose", "rifaximin", "prophylactic_antibiotic",
  "nsaids", "beta_blockers", "albumin_amount_admission",
  "diabetes", "cad", "htn", "etiology_cirrhosis",
  "ascites_admission", "encephalopathy_admission", "gi_bleed_admission",
  "peritonitis_admission", "hcc_admission", "tips_admission", "na_admit",
  "k_admit", "cl_admit", "co2_admit", "bun_admit", "urine_creatinine", "fena",
  "he_grade_admission", "baseline_creatinine", "CLIF_C_Score", "aclf_grade",
  "liver_transplant_listed", "icu_admission", "liver_transplant",
  "peak_creatinine", "AKI_responders",
  "creatinine_admission",
  "death_in_90days_status", "los", "discharge_disposition",
  "palliative_care", "intubated", "MELD_baseline",
  "MELD_Na_baseline", "time_90days", "status_90days","subjectid"
)

final_terlipressin <- terlipressin_numeric %>% select(var1)
final_terlipressin <- final_terlipressin %>%
  mutate(MELD_Na_baseline = ifelse(is.na(MELD_Na_baseline), median(MELD_Na_baseline, na.rm = TRUE), MELD_Na_baseline))

order_names <- names(final_terlipressin)
Show code
# read hrs

# read additional site-level data

  mutate(sediment_description = NA, albumin_amount_prior = NA) %>%
  select(study_id,  creatinine_last_available, nephrology_sediment, granular_casts,

  select(study_id,  creatinine_last_available, nephrology_sediment, granular_casts,

Rochester0913 <- read_excel("/Users/to909/Desktop/Andrew/Rochester0913.xlsx") %>%

  mutate(sediment_description = NA, creatinine_last_available = NA,
         rrt_crrt = NA, days_peak_cre = NA, days_last_cre = NA, albumin_amount_prior = NA) %>%
  select(study_id,  creatinine_last_available, nephrology_sediment, granular_casts,
         sediment_description, rrt_crrt, days_peak_cre, days_last_cre, albumin_amount_prior)

Yale0913 <- read_excel("/Users/to909/Desktop/Andrew/Yale0913.xlsx") %>%

  select(study_id,  creatinine_last_available, nephrology_sediment, granular_casts,
         sediment_description, rrt_crrt, days_peak_cre, days_last_cre, albumin_amount_prior)

addtional_vars <- rbind(
  Baylor0913, Indiana0913, Jacksonville0913, Kentukey0913, MCW0913,
  MGH0913, Michigan0913, Oschner0913, Rochester0913, USC0913, Yale0913
) %>%
  select(-albumin_amount_prior)

# merge all 
hrs <- merge(hrs, addtional_vars, by = "study_id", all.x = TRUE) %>%
  rename(subjectid = study_id)

# Clean variables 
hrs <- hrs %>%
  mutate(
    White = ifelse(White == 1, 1, 0),
    etiology_cirrhosis = case_when(
      etiology_cirrhosis == 1 ~ 1,
      etiology_cirrhosis == 2 ~ 2,
      etiology_cirrhosis == 3 ~ 3,
      etiology_cirrhosis == 5 ~ 4,
      etiology_cirrhosis %in% c(4, 6, 7) ~ 5,
      TRUE ~ NA_real_
    )
  )

# hrs <- hrs %>%
#   mutate(
#     liver_transplant_90days_time = ifelse(!is.na(days_liver), days_liver, 90),
#     liver_transplant_90days_status=ifelse(!is.na(days_liver),1,0),
#     # Time variable: whichever event happens first
#  # 1. TIME: The time is the minimum of the two event times
#     time_to_death_90days_cmp = pmin(death_in_90days_time, liver_transplant_90days_time, na.rm = TRUE),
#     
#     # 2. STATUS: Determine which event happened first
#     status_90days = case_when(
#       # Condition 1: Death happened first (or on the exact same day as transplant)
#       time_to_death_90days_cmp == death_in_90days_time & death_in_90days_status == 1 ~ 1,
#       
#       # Condition 2: Transplant happened first before death
#       time_to_death_90days_cmp == liver_transplant_90days_time & liver_transplant_90days_status == 1 ~ 2,
#       
#       # Condition 0: Censored (Neither happened by the time of their follow-up/90 days)
#       TRUE ~ 0
#     )
#   )






final_hrs_aki <- hrs %>%
  mutate(group = "hrs") %>%
  filter(final_type_of_aki == 2, hrs_vasoconstrictor == 1) %>%
  select(order_names) %>%
  mutate(MELD_Na_baseline = ifelse(is.na(MELD_Na_baseline), median(MELD_Na_baseline, na.rm = TRUE), MELD_Na_baseline))

all_final <- rbind(final_hrs_aki, final_terlipressin) %>%
  mutate(
    liver_transplant = ifelse(is.na(liver_transplant), 0, liver_transplant),
    disposition_new = case_when(
      discharge_disposition == 2 ~ 0,
      discharge_disposition == 3 ~ 1
    ),
    hrs_responders_cat_2 = ifelse(AKI_responders == "no response", 0, 1),
    etiology_cirrhosis_cat2 = ifelse(etiology_cirrhosis == 1, 1, 0),
    group_numerical = ifelse(group == "hrs", 0, 1)
  )

title: HRS Terli project
text:
Matching and balance diagnostics


Show code
matched_data <- matchit(
  group_numerical ~ age_admission + sex + ascites_admission + etiology_cirrhosis_cat2 + MELD_Na_baseline,
  data   = all_final,
  method = "nearest",
  distance = "glm",
  ratio  = 1,
  caliper = 0.2  # common recommendation: 0.2 on PS logit SD
)

matched_data <- match.data(matched_data, drop.unmatched = TRUE)

Show code
# Define admission SCr using creatinine_admission for both groups

scr_day0 <- terlipressin_numeric %>%
  select(subjectid, scr_terli_day0)


matched_data <- matched_data %>% merge(scr_day0, by = "subjectid", all.x = TRUE) %>%
  mutate(
    scr_terli_day0 = ifelse(is.na(scr_terli_day0),creatinine_admission,scr_terli_day0))

matched_data <- matched_data %>%
  rename(scr = scr_terli_day0)

scr_breaks <- c(1.51, 2.0, 2.5, 3.0, 3.5, 4.0, 4.5, 5.0, Inf)
scr_labels <- c(
  "1.51–1.99",
  "2.0–2.49",
  "2.5–2.99",
  "3.0–3.49",
  "3.5–3.99",
  "4.0–4.49",
  "4.5–4.99",
  "≥5.0"
)

matched_data <- matched_data %>%
  mutate(
    scr_cat = cut(scr, breaks = scr_breaks, labels = scr_labels, right = FALSE)
  )

tab_req2 <- matched_data %>%
  group_by(scr_cat, group) %>%
  summarise(
    n = n(),
    resp_rate = mean(hrs_responders_cat_2, na.rm = TRUE) * 100,
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  tidyr::pivot_wider(
    id_cols = scr_cat,
    names_from = group,
    values_from = resp_rate,
    names_glue = "{group}_pct"
  ) %>%
  dplyr::left_join(
    matched_data %>%
      group_by(scr_cat) %>%
      summarise(overall_pct = mean(hrs_responders_cat_2, na.rm = TRUE) * 100, .groups = "drop"),
    by = "scr_cat"
  ) %>%
  arrange(scr_cat)

tab_req2

scr_breaks <- c(1.51, 2.0, 2.5, 3.0, 3.5, 4.0, 4.5, 5.0, Inf)
scr_labels <- c(
  "1.51–1.99",
  "2.0–2.49",
  "2.5–2.99",
  "3.0–3.49",
  "3.5–3.99",
  "4.0–4.49",
  "4.5–4.99",
  "≥5.0"
)


matched_data <- matched_data %>%
  mutate(
    peak_creatinine_cat = cut(peak_creatinine, breaks = scr_breaks, labels = scr_labels, right = FALSE)
  )

tab_req3 <- matched_data %>%
  group_by(peak_creatinine_cat, group) %>%
  summarise(
    n = n(),
    resp_rate = mean(hrs_responders_cat_2, na.rm = TRUE) * 100,
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  tidyr::pivot_wider(
    id_cols = peak_creatinine_cat,
    names_from = group,
    values_from = resp_rate,
    names_glue = "{group}_pct"
  ) %>%
  dplyr::left_join(
    matched_data %>%
      group_by(peak_creatinine_cat) %>%
      summarise(overall_pct = mean(hrs_responders_cat_2, na.rm = TRUE) * 100, .groups = "drop"),
    by = "peak_creatinine_cat"
  ) %>%
  arrange(peak_creatinine_cat)

tab_req3

matched_data$status_90days <- as.factor(matched_data$status_90days)
ci_obj <- tidycmprsk::cuminc(
  formula = Surv(time_90days, status_90days) ~ group,
  data = matched_data,
  cencode = 0
)
ggsurvfit::ggcuminc(ci_obj) +
  labs(
    x = "Days",
    y = "Cumulative incidence of death",
    color = "Cohort"
  ) +
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = seq(0, 90, by = 15), limits = c(0, 90)) +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(
    panel.grid.major = element_blank(),
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank()
  )

Show code
# Build unified rrt variable from both cohorts
rrt_terli <- terlipressin_numeric %>%
  select(subjectid, rrt) %>%
  mutate(rrt = as.numeric(rrt))

rrt_hrs <- hrs %>%
  select(subjectid, rrt_crrt) %>%
  rename(rrt = rrt_crrt) %>%
  mutate(rrt = as.numeric(rrt))

rrt_all <- bind_rows(rrt_terli, rrt_hrs) %>%
  distinct(subjectid, .keep_all = TRUE)

matched_data_rrt <- matched_data %>%
  left_join(rrt_all, by = "subjectid")

table1_rrt <- CreateTableOne(
  vars = "rrt",
  strata = "group",
  data = matched_data_rrt,
  factorVars = "rrt"
)

print(table1_rrt, printToggle = FALSE) %>%
  knitr::kable(format = "html", caption = "RRT by Group") %>%
  kable_styling(bootstrap_options = c("striped", "hover", "condensed", "responsive"), full_width = FALSE)
